name: Archmage

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The archmage has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Archmage

*Medium or Small Humanoid (Wizard), Neutral*

### Actions

**Arcane Burst.** Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. or range 150 ft. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) Force damage.
